name: part_002
file: tmp_【 超重大告知あり‼ 】 #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 ～Liminal～【 桃鈴ねね ⧸ 3DLive 】 [YgZNZM81OcA]_gemini-3-flash-preview\reencoded\part_002.mov

scenes.description: Nene Momosuzu performs 'Donten' (曇天) on a Gothic-themed stage with peach and carrot mascots.
Transition to a colorful, bright stage for the next song.
Nene Momosuzu performs 'Perfect-area complete!' on a vibrant, celebratory stage.

subtitles.original: 鉛の空 重く垂れ込め
subtitles.english: Lead-colored sky hangs heavy

subtitles.original: 真白に澱んだ 太陽が砕けて
subtitles.english: The pure white, stagnant sun shatters

subtitles.original: 耳鳴りを 尖らせる
subtitles.english: Sharpening the ringing in my ears

subtitles.original: ひゅるりひゅるり 低空飛行
subtitles.english: Whirling, whirling, flying low

subtitles.original: 蜂の字なぞって ビルの谷を駆ける
subtitles.english: Tracing a figure-eight, running through the valleys of buildings

subtitles.original: もうじきに 夕立が来る
subtitles.english: Soon, an evening shower will come

subtitles.original: 曇天の道を 傘を忘れて
subtitles.english: On a cloudy road, forgetting my umbrella

subtitles.original: 歩く彼女は 雨に怯えてる
subtitles.english: She walks, afraid of the rain

subtitles.original: ので 僕も 弱虫ぶら下げて
subtitles.english: So I too, hanging my cowardice

subtitles.original: 空を仰ぐ
subtitles.english: Look up at the sky

subtitles.original: あちらこちら あんよは上手
subtitles.english: Here and there, walking so well

subtitles.original: 珈琲屋に寄って 一休み決めたら
subtitles.english: Stopping by a coffee shop, once I decide to take a break

subtitles.original: 帰れない 帰らない
subtitles.english: I can't go back, I won't go back

subtitles.original: 曇天の道を ぶらりぶらぶら
subtitles.english: On a cloudy road, wandering aimlessly

subtitles.original: 歩く二人は 足軽のごとく
subtitles.english: The two walking like foot soldiers

subtitles.original: 危険好きの 誰かのふりをする
subtitles.english: Pretending to be someone who loves danger

subtitles.original: 初心者共
subtitles.english: Beginners

subtitles.original: 曇天の道を 傘を忘れて
subtitles.english: On a cloudy road, forgetting my umbrella

subtitles.original: 歩く彼女は 雨に怯えてる
subtitles.english: She walks, afraid of the rain

subtitles.original: ので 僕も 弱虫ぶら下げて
subtitles.english: So I too, hanging my cowardice

subtitles.original: 空を仰ぐ
subtitles.english: Look up at the sky

subtitles.original: 放っておいて育つもの
subtitles.english: Things that grow if you leave them alone

subtitles.original: 何だ 何だろ?
subtitles.english: What is it? I wonder what it is?

subtitles.original: One more chance! One more chance!
subtitles.english: One more chance! One more chance!

subtitles.original: Never never give up!
subtitles.english: Never never give up!

subtitles.original: One more chance! One more chance!
subtitles.english: One more chance! One more chance!

subtitles.original: Never never give up!
subtitles.english: Never never give up!

subtitles.original: Perfect-area complete!
subtitles.english: Perfect-area complete!

subtitles.original: 運営さんなんか放送エコーが切れてるかもとのことで確認お願いします
subtitles.english: Staff, it seems the broadcast echo might be cut off, so please check.

subtitles.original: 出会いましては簡単すぎよ
subtitles.english: Meeting you was too easy

subtitles.original: 最初に決めた答えはひとつ
subtitles.english: The answer I first decided on was one

subtitles.original: ときめきました合格しますか?
subtitles.english: I felt a spark, will I pass?

subtitles.original: 恋も勝負もあわてない
subtitles.english: Don't rush love or a match

subtitles.original: コツコツコツと徹夜にため息
subtitles.english: Step by step, sighing through all-nighters

subtitles.original: 私の中に天才ドリマー
subtitles.english: There's a genius dreamer inside me

subtitles.original: 思うこと皆叶えばいいな
subtitles.english: I wish everything I thought of would come true

subtitles.original: 人の世界は気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't care about other people's worlds

subtitles.original: Perfect-area complete!
subtitles.english: Perfect-area complete!

subtitles.original: 絶対ここで待ってるんだ
subtitles.english: I'm definitely waiting here

subtitles.original: Perfect-area 望む声が
subtitles.english: Perfect-area, the voices wishing for it

subtitles.original: 聞こえるよ
subtitles.english: I can hear them

subtitles.original: Ai-ai-ya!
subtitles.english: Ai-ai-ya!

subtitles.original: ほら止まらない すれ違い
subtitles.english: Look, it won't stop, passing each other

subtitles.original: 私が壮大天下なら
subtitles.english: If I ruled the grand world

subtitles.original: 友達かい?
subtitles.english: Are we friends?

subtitles.original: 友達です!
subtitles.english: We are friends!

subtitles.original: 悲しきレッテルのやり直し
subtitles.english: Redoing the sad labels

subtitles.original: 書き直し
subtitles.english: Rewriting

subtitles.original: 本気でワン・チャンス!
subtitles.english: Seriously one chance!

subtitles.original: 今より素敵な未来があるのに
subtitles.english: Even though there's a more wonderful future than now

subtitles.original: 今より素敵に My life, my life, my life!
subtitles.english: More wonderful than now, my life, my life, my life!

subtitles.original: あざーす！みんなもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thanks! Thank you everyone too!

subtitles.original: 続きましてはお月様にも
subtitles.english: Next, even to the moon

subtitles.original: お星様にも
subtitles.english: And to the stars

subtitles.original: 科学的にはどうにもならず
subtitles.english: Scientifically nothing can be done

subtitles.original: 輝きました明日を夢見て
subtitles.english: It shined, dreaming of tomorrow

subtitles.original: 恋で我慢を
subtitles.english: Patience through love

subtitles.original: 学んだね
subtitles.english: I've learned

subtitles.original: ムクムクムクと広がる雨雲
subtitles.english: Puffy rain clouds spreading

subtitles.original: 私を濡らす瞬間スコール
subtitles.english: A sudden squall soaking me

subtitles.original: 悩みごとほら流れたみたい
subtitles.english: Look, it seems my worries washed away

subtitles.original: 泣き言なんて忘れよう
subtitles.english: Let's forget about complaints

subtitles.original: Fascination conversation
subtitles.english: Fascination conversation

subtitles.original: 感動したいもっとずっと
subtitles.english: I want to be moved more and forever
